name: github_create_scoped_access_token
description: POST /applications/{client_id}/token/scoped — create scoped user access token. Required: client_id, access_token. Optional: target, target_id, repositories, repository_ids, permissions.

client_id.description: The client ID of the GitHub App.

access_token.description: The user access token used to authenticate to the GitHub API.

target.description: Login of the user or organization to scope to.

target_id.description: Numeric id of the user or organization to scope to.

repositories.description: Repository names to scope the token to.

repository_ids.description: Repository IDs to scope the token to.

permissions.description: Permissions to grant on the scoped token.
